query:
SELECT cp.id, cp.competitionId, cp.sellerId, s.name, cp.points, cp.salesCount,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE sellerId = cp.sellerId AND competitionId = cp.competitionId AND status = 'approved') as vendas_reais
FROM competition_participants cp
JOIN sellers s ON s.id = cp.sellerId
WHERE cp.competitionId = (SELECT id FROM competitions WHERE status = 'active' LIMIT 1)
ORDER BY cp.points DESC;
